requirements.title: Heap Initialization
requirements.description: The heap module shall initialize from a caller-provided backing array.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Element Comparison Injection
requirements.description: The heap module shall accept an injected element pointer API with Compare and Swap operations.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Insert
requirements.description: The heap shall insert an element and restore the heap property in O(log n) time.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Pop
requirements.description: The heap shall remove the root element and restore the heap property in O(log n) time.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Pop Output
requirements.description: The heap Pop operation shall copy the removed root element into a caller-provided pointer descriptor.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Heapify
requirements.description: The heap shall transform the underlying array into a valid heap in O(n) time.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Vtable Validation
requirements.description: The heap module shall verify that the heap API vtable entries are non-null before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.

requirements.title: Heap Dependency Validation
requirements.description: The heap module shall verify that the backing array and heap pointer API dependencies are valid before each operation.
requirements.rationale: Enables fundamental data structure capabilities for embedded applications without dynamic allocation.
